name: Idea Bot
description:
This bot is designed to help you, if you are as uncreative as me. You can simply ask it for ideas, regarding scenarios or even whole chatbots.
For example, if you want to create a new character, you can simply tell it your idea, and ask it to make a personality, scenario and first message around it.

One of my first bots, so feel free to give me some tips on how to improve it :)
creator: Creziel
